title: caryophyllaceae
intro: The Caryophyllaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the pink or carnation family. This family consists of approximately 85 genera and over 1,200 species, including pinks, carnations, dianthus, and cranesbills. Many members of the Caryophyllaceae family are known for their showy, fragrant flowers and ability to thrive in dry conditions. They are found on every continent except Antarctica and are often cultivated for their ornamental value.
